phrases.translation: From the toil/work of his soul, he will see.
phrases.summary: It describes that, as a result of the suffering or labor of the person’s soul, he will come to see something.

phrases.translation: he will be satisfied with his knowledge.
phrases.summary: It states that he will reach a state of satisfaction grounded in his knowledge/understanding.

phrases.translation: My righteous servant will justify many.
phrases.summary: It explains that the righteous servant will act in a way that results in many being justified/declared righteous.

phrases.translation: and he will bear their iniquities.
phrases.summary: It says that he will take responsibility for, and carry, the iniquities/sins of many—bearing them rather than leaving them with others.
